researchQuestions: does dignity affect main-star positive contribution?
does dignity affect main-star negative contribution?
does dignity affect annual star contribution?
does dignity affect Tứ Hóa contribution?

requiredDignitySet.description: V0.8's `requiresDignity` rule field (V08StarRule) is optional; when present, it gates whether a rule matches based on `star.brightness` (dignityOk() in match-stars.ts). This pack found no full enumeration of which specific rules currently set it, beyond what is visible per-rule in rule-coverage.v0.8.json.

optionalDignityMultiplier.description: No numeric dignity multiplier exists in V0.8 — dignity is a binary gate (matches or doesn't), not a magnitude scaler. `dignifiedStaticPositive` is a distinct point class (value 2) rather than a multiplier applied to `staticPositive` (value 1); it is configured per-rule, not derived by multiplying.

noDignityDependency.description: Most rules in the registry do not set `requiresDignity` at all and are unconditional on dignity.

schoolSpecificDisagreement.description: Not evaluated — this pack has no Trung Châu dignity policy to compare against, and no classical/school-manual source to establish whether Nam Phái's binary dignity gate matches or diverges from other schools' treatment.

readinessNote: RESEARCH_INCOMPLETE for dignity policy as a whole — no source-backed evidence was found to justify any V0.9 change, and per task instruction this pack introduces no numeric dignity multipliers.
